privileged_info_summary: The northwind_employee_hierarchy task uses the real Microsoft Northwind sample database containing exactly 9 employees. The database is publicly available from the GitHub repository jpwhite3/northwind-SQLite3 and can be downloaded from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jpwhite3/northwind-SQLite3/main/Northwind_large.sql or its alternative main branch URL. The organizational hierarchy consists of Andrew Fuller (Vice President, Sales) as the top manager with 5 direct reports and 8 total subordinates across 2 depth levels. Steven Buchanan (Sales Manager) is the only other manager, with 3 direct reports and 3 total subordinates at 1 depth level. All metadata claims in task.json have been independently verified against the actual employee data from the Northwind database and official documentation sources.
